hooks.prompt:
Check if the file just modified is an instruction file (CLAUDE.md, .claude.local.md, or any file under .claude/rules/, .claude/agents/, .claude/skills/). If it is NOT an instruction file, do nothing — stop here, produce no output.

If it IS an instruction file, call `alignkit_local_lint` with the file path. If the tool is unavailable or fails, do a quick manual check for conflicting rules or vague language instead.

Surface the 1-3 most important findings. If no issues found, say nothing.

If you already surfaced the same warning for this exact file earlier in this session, say nothing. Keep all output to 1-2 sentences maximum.
